items.title: Cathie Wood Sells Palantir Shares Worth $2.65 Million Ahead Of Earnings, Doubles Down On This Chip Giant
items.description: On Wednesday, April 30, 2025, Cathie Wood sold $2.65 million worth of Palantir shares through various ARK ETFs.

items.title: Why Caterpillar Stock Is Volatile Today
items.description: Cat missed top- and bottom-line estimates, but investors were braced for a disappointing quarter.  The company is likely to feel pressure on both supply and demand due to tariffs, meaning patience will be required from investors.  Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) reported weaker-than-expected first-quarter results and lowered full-year guidance.

items.title: 20 company reactions — good and bad — to Trump’s tariff war
items.description: Here’s a sector-by-sector breakdown of how major players are reacting to the mounting pressure of tariffs and retaliatory trade measures. The post 20 company reactions — good and bad — to Trump’s tariff war appeared first on FreightWaves.

items.title: Caterpillar Announces Virtual 2025 Shareholder Meeting
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) will hold a virtual annual shareholder meeting Wednesday, June 11 at 8 a.m. CDT.
